# System Admin MCP

> FastMCP 3.2 server for elevated Windows system administration. Run as Administrator.

## Quick start

```
uvx system-admin-mcp
```

Or from source: `uv sync && uv run system-admin-mcp`

## Key files

- [README.md](README.md) — overview, features, FastMCP 3.2 capabilities table
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — architecture, tool list, agent rules, file patterns
- [justfile](justfile) — task runner: `just dev`, `just test`, `just lint`, `just mcpb-pack`
- [pyproject.toml](pyproject.toml) — deps: `fastmcp[tasks]>=3.2.0,<4`, `pywin32`, `psutil`, `wmi`, `prefab-ui>=0.14.0`
- [docs/quickstart.md](docs/quickstart.md) — end-user setup guide
- [docs/api/README.md](docs/api/README.md) — REST API endpoints

## Source structure

- `src/system_admin_mcp/app.py` — FastMCP 3.2 instance, lifespan, providers
- `src/system_admin_mcp/main.py` — entry point, `--web` flag
- `src/system_admin_mcp/server.py` — FastAPI backend (20+ REST endpoints on /api/*)
- `src/system_admin_mcp/transport.py` — stdio + streamable-http dual transport
- `src/system_admin_mcp/prompts.py` — 4 `@mcp.prompt()` templates
- `src/system_admin_mcp/tools/portmanteau.py` — `system_admin` tool (40+ ops dispatcher)
- `src/system_admin_mcp/tools/implementations.py` — file recovery, ACLs, disk ops, WMI
- `src/system_admin_mcp/tools/services_and_tasks.py` — services, processes, startup, taskbar
- `src/system_admin_mcp/tools/agentic_system_workflow.py` — SEP-1577 sampling workflows
- `src/system_admin_mcp/tools/monitoring.py` — watchdog file watcher
- `src/system_admin_mcp/tools/prefab/` — 4 Prefab UI cards
- `web_sota/` — React 19 + Vite dashboard (14 pages)

## Portmanteau pattern

Everything goes through one tool:

```
system_admin(operation="<op>", ...)
```

Operations: scan_volume, recover_file, get_permissions, set_permissions, check_disk_health, disk_cleanup, defragment_disk, optimize_ssd, get_hardware_info, get_os_info, get_installed_software, get_performance_metrics, get_event_log, health_check, list_services, start_service, stop_service, set_service_startup, list_processes, analyze_process, kill_process, list_startup_programs, add_startup_program, remove_startup_program, get_taskbar_settings, set_taskbar_autohide, and more.

## API endpoints

- `GET /api/health` — basic health check
- `GET /api/status` — system status (CPU, RAM, disk, uptime)
- `GET /api/processes?sort_by=cpu&page=1&page_size=50` — paginated process list
- `GET /api/processes/{pid}` — detailed process info
- `GET /api/services?page=1&page_size=50` — paginated service list
- `GET /api/volumes` — drive listing
- `POST /api/disk_usage` — check disk usage for a path
- `POST /api/file_owner` — get file owner
- `GET /api/logs` — system log viewer
- `GET /api/tools` — list registered MCP tools
- `POST /api/tools/call` — execute any MCP tool
